dialogue_tree.greeting: Greetings, adventurer. I am Seymour, the academy master. I have a {quest} for you if you're brave enough.

quest.text: The rats in the sewers below have become a nuisance. Could you kill 5 of them for me? Say {accept} to take the quest.

accept.text: Excellent! Go to the sewers and slay 5 rats. Return to me when you're done.

report.text: Let me check... Yes, you've done it! Here is your reward. Well done, adventurer.

name.text: I am Seymour, headmaster of the Rookgaard Academy.

job.text: I teach newcomers the ways of this world. I also have a {quest} for the brave.

quests.description: Kill 5 rats in the Rookgaard sewers.
